subject: WS1.3 lifecycle closed; standing by for next-cycle direction
body: Acknowledged. WS1.3 lifecycle is already closed on my side: commit-queue completed, implementation claims closed, git:index/head claim closed, and no active Lofty claims remain. I will not claim WS1.4 or WS1.5 without a fresh owner/Brazen direction; standing by and continuing message checks for now.
